raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., mean trust ≠ calibration), and proposes minimal repairs to address these issues.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data, ensuring that claims about mean reliance and calibration are supported by the methods and results described.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for key aspects of the study, such as whether per-trial correctness data is available and whether verbal significantly exceeded numeric in post-hoc contrasts.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, with no drift from the requested improvements.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential limitations in the original study design.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., mean trust ≠ calibration), and proposes minimal repairs to address these issues.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data, ensuring that claims about mean reliance and calibration are supported by the methods and results described.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for key aspects of the study, such as whether per-trial correctness data is available and whether verbal significantly exceeded numeric in post-hoc contrasts.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, with no drift from the requested improvements.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential limitations in the original study design.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications.
